description.zh-Hans: 生成流动熔岩纹理，带有发光裂缝、冷却地壳、余烬条纹和湍流图案。完全可平铺。
description.en: Generates flowing lava textures with glowing fissures, cooling crust, ember streaks, and turbulent flow patterns. Fully tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 熔岩, 岩浆, 火山, 流动岩浆, 炽热, 地狱
triggers.en: lava, magma, molten, volcanic, flow, fiery

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成流动熔岩纹理，用于火山场景、地牢或地狱风格的地面材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate flowing lava textures for volcanic scenes, dungeons, or hell-themed ground materials.
